title: A Vanishing Act: The Mystery of the Isdal Woman

scenes.text: A woman's body was found, but her identity remains unknown.
It happened in Bergen, Norway, in 1970.
In November 1970, an unidentified woman was found in Isdalen Valley, known as the Isdal Woman.
Despite investigations, her case remains one of Norway's greatest mysteries.
scenes.label: STILL UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Bergen, Norway - 1970. The Isdal Woman was found dead, but her identity and fate remain unknown. Follow for daily cold cases!
